product.name: ArClean 250
product.titleDescriptor: 80% polyester 20% polyamide microfiber cleaning cloth fabric
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 80% Polyester 20% Polyamide, microfiber warp knit fabric
descriptions: ArClean 250 is microfiber cloth fabric, mostly used to make cleaning cloth.
Available in neon color and large width.
80% polyester 20% polyamide microfiber cleaning cloth fabric
250 g/m², 80% Polyester 20% Polyamide, microfiber warp knit fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
